title: Replace image gallery photos with new facility images

requirements.text: Replace the existing 12 facility photos in the ImageGallery component with the 6 uploaded images (enhanced_348s (7).jpg, enhanced_348s.jpg, enhanced_348s (8).jpg, enhanced_517620380_1306336444832099_8194069313658765999_n.jpg, enhanced_517940772_1306336431498767_8407149108597182872_n.jpg, enhanced_518270242_1306336364832107_8264580889139094172_n.jpg)

quotes: can you swap these correcte pictures out for the old pics

acceptanceCriteria: The ImageGallery component displays the 6 new uploaded facility images
Old gallery images are removed from the component
The grid layout adjusts appropriately for 6 images instead of 12
Images maintain responsive behavior and hover effects
Modal dialog still functions for enlarged image views

nonGoals: Modifying the ImageGallery component structure or styling beyond image replacement
Changing other page components or layouts
Adding new images beyond the 6 uploaded
